TextRun.Text: the beauty and complexity of Sichuan Opera
part v. 分开，分离，分散
, the 12-year cycle of the Chinese zodiac

RichText.Text: 1. be captivated/fascinated/attracted by 2. facial expressions a confused expression/look 3. convey/express the beauty and complexity of Sichuan Opera to a global audience 4. have an opportunity to do sth. 5. the underlined word 6. inspire sb. to do sth. 7. a notable feature 8. emphasize/highlight/stress 9. the technical aspects of the makeup and costumes 10. compare...with... 11. take first place 12. part the clouds （part v. 分开，分离，分散） 13. speedy tiger and rabbit 14. fall behind but make up ground 15. With the race over and places decided, the 12-year cycle of the Chinese zodiac came into being.

TextRun.Text: ，十二生肖的十二年周期便由此

RichText.Text: 1. 被……吸引／迷住 2. 面部表情 一个感到困惑的表情 3. 向全球观众传达川剧的美丽与复杂 4. 有机会做某事 5. 带下划线的单词 6. 激励某人做某事 7. 一个显著的特征 8. 强调 9. 妆容与服装的技术层面/方面 10. 将……与……比较 11. 获得第一名 12. 拨开云雾 13. 迅捷的/快速的兔子和老虎 14. 落后但迎头赶上 15. 比赛结束，名次已定，十二生肖的十二年周期便由此形成。
